name: Honey Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter an 8-inch square pan.
3. Melt chocolate and butter in a medium-sized heavy saucepan over low heat.
4. Remove from heat; cool slightly.
5. Stir in eggs, honey, and vanilla.
6. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a small bowl.
7. Stir in the chocolate mixture with walnuts.
8. Spread batter evenly in the prepared pan.
9. Bake 20-25 minutes or just until the center feels springy.
10. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
11. Cut into 2-inch squares.
